name: the-tragedy-of-great-power-politics
description: John Mearsheimer's The Tragedy of Great Power Politics — an executable toolkit on offensive realism: why great powers inevitably compete for regional hegemony and how the international system drives conflict
useCase: Helps anyone understand international relations through the lens of offensive realism — why great powers expand, why conflict is inevitable, and how the structure of the international system drives state behavior.
knownRisks: The book presents a specific realist theory that some find deterministic or pessimistic
